mapper.sql: AA.BANNER_MST_CD , AA.BANNER_TYPE , AA.BANNER_MST_NAME , AA.BANNER_MST_DESC , AA.USE_YN , COALESCE(AA.WIDTH, 0) AS WIDTH , COALESCE(AA.HEIGHT, 0) AS HEIGHT , AA.PREVIEW_URL , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.BANNER_MST_CD), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.BANNER_TYPE), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.BANNER_MST_DESC), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )
